title: Are You Gonna Be My Girl
why_this_song: Are You Gonna Be My Girl by Jet (2003) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I said, are you gonna be my girl"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Because you look so fine that I really wanna make you mine"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Because you look so fine that I really wanna make you mine"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Because you look so fine that I really wanna make you mine"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Oh, four, five, six, c'mon and get your kicks"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "girl" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "girl" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "fine" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Now you don't need the money
Before I let you get away, yeah
But you were with another man, yeah

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: When you look like that do you honey

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Are You Gonna Be My Girl" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Are You Gonna Be My Girl"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Jet one question about "Are You Gonna Be My Girl", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Jet sobre "Are You Gonna Be My Girl", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Are You Gonna Be My Girl" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Are You Gonna Be My Girl" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
